name: mcp.film production playbooks
description: Curated MCP stacks for common AI filmmaking workflows.

playbooks.title: AI Commercial Sprint
playbooks.summary: A fast path from brief to polished 30-60 second ad with one studio, one model hub, voice, edit, finish, and upload.
playbooks.best_for: Launch videos, product promos, UGC-style ads, and short brand films where speed matters more than bespoke tooling.

playbooks.title: Character-Consistent Series

playbooks.best_for: Serial social films, AI influencers, explainers, recurring product mascots, and episodic shorts.
